description: You are a QA Engineer performing a functional validation of the OpenICE Infusion Safety system. Verify that the infusion pump stops when SpO2 drops below a threshold using a Pulse Oximeter and a simulated Infusion Pump in the Infusion Safety app. Validate the system behavior across three conditions: a nominal state (80% threshold), an interlock trigger state (100% threshold), and a recovery state (80% threshold). Save screenshots of the application for each condition to /home/ga/test_step_1_nominal.png, /home/ga/test_step_2_interlock.png, and /home/ga/test_step_3_recovery.png respectively. Document the results for each step in a CSV file at /home/ga/Desktop/fvp_results.csv using the headers: Step, Threshold_Setting, Observed_Pump_State, and Pass_Fail.
